stem: 28% of the items in a bin are red. Of those, 28% are also circular. Of the red circular items, 35% are also plastic. Which of the following is closest to the percentage of the items in the bin that are not red circular plastic items?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The fraction of items that are red, circular, AND plastic is 0.28 × 0.28 × 0.35 = 0.027440, or about 2.74%. Therefore, the fraction of items that are NOT red circular plastic is about 100% − 2.74% = 97.26%.

Choice A is the percent that ARE red circular plastic. Choices C and D ignore one or more factors.
